programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep211: Nova Scotia, Canada
programme.desc: Host Steven Bull explores the history Nova Scotia with a to-the-centimetre replica of the “Hector”, checks out the oldest Yacht Club in the Americas and then goes Tidal Bore Rafting.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep107: Maui, Hawaii - USA
programme.desc: Adventures on Maui include ATV riding at Kahomo Ranch, watching Cirque Polynesia, sailing on Teralani, enjoying the Wailele Polynesian Luau and having fun at Mulligans/Willie K.

programme.title: Shark Encounters in the Deep
programme.desc: Hand-feeding and “flipping” Tiger Sharks in the Bahamas, diving with Great Whites near Mexico’s Guadalupe Island, learn how to put sharks into a relaxed state known as “Tonic Immobility”, enabling sharks to serve as camera operators.

programme.title: Lost In Tasmania
programme.desc: Lost In Tasmania takes viewers on a journey of discovery and adventure in search of surfing nirvana - perfect waves! We travel with local surfer Mikey Brennan as he and friends explore the secluded East Coast of Tasmania, the Tasman Peninsula and famed Shipstern Bluff where they find incredible scenery and epic waves.

programme.title: Journeys In Africa Ep206: Victoria Falls…The Smoke That Thunders
programme.desc: One of the 7 Natural Wonders of the World, Victoria Falls is an amazing spectacle that straddles the Zambia/Zimbabwe border. The force of the water is so intense that the water bouncing back creates a rainforest. Remarkably, the wildlife in the area is as abundant as the water going over the falls.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep102: Ocean Impact
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep108: Behind-The-Scenes of Unlimited Superboat Jet Sprinting
programme.desc: Hot Water goes behind-the-scenes of Unlimited Superboat Jet Sprinting. V8 Unlimited Superboats are the top racing class in Jet Sprinting with the boats being unrestricted.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep211: Nova Scotia, Canada
programme.desc: Host Steven Bull explores the history Nova Scotia with a to-the-centimetre replica of the “Hector”, checks out the oldest Yacht Club in the Americas and then goes Tidal Bore Rafting.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep107: Maui, Hawaii - USA
programme.desc: Adventures on Maui include ATV riding at Kahomo Ranch, watching Cirque Polynesia, sailing on Teralani, enjoying the Wailele Polynesian Luau and having fun at Mulligans/Willie K.

programme.title: Shark Encounters in the Deep
programme.desc: Hand-feeding and “flipping” Tiger Sharks in the Bahamas, diving with Great Whites near Mexico’s Guadalupe Island, learn how to put sharks into a relaxed state known as “Tonic Immobility”, enabling sharks to serve as camera operators.

programme.title: La Quinta Films Presents: Lines
programme.desc: Lines is a documentary about big mountain snowboarding. The dedication. The nerve. The skill. As we follow the Absinthe Films crew for six weeks in Haines, Alaska, we also explore the colorful characters, history and dangers of big mountain riding. Directed by Axel Pauporté and Flora Richard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Twe12ve
programme.desc: A winter of extremes sets the stage for Twe12ve. Absinthe Films follows twelve riders chasing record snow across legendary ranges, pushing boundaries and redefining what’s possible in another wintry shred classic.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Escramble
programme.desc: In a time beyond and close to now... a vision was revealed. A vision of the very first dream of life. The dream of life before there was life. The dream that vapor dreams of becoming solid and falling to meet whatever will catch and hold it. Thus begins "ESCRAMBLE". Featuring Bjorn Leines, Terje Haakonsen, Mark Landvik, Wille Yli-Louma, Shaun White, Seth Huot, Gigi Rüf, Erik Leines, Bryan Iguchi, Chris Demolski and Jamie Lynn.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: 9191
programme.desc: 9191 is a sideways introspective into the bewildering snow-covered dreamscape of international time traveler and mystic of the shred - Gigi Rüf.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Isle Of Snow
programme.desc: Join us as we explore the snowboard world through the perspectives of the people who live it and have made it their lives follow their passions.

programme.title: The Manboys Movie
programme.desc: The boys are back with new friends and a brand new snowboard film. The Manboys Movie will definitely top your expectations. Featuring bangers from Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Craig McMorris, Jody Wachniak, Matt Belzile, Anto Chamberland, and Mark Sollors.

programme.title: The ManBoys Presents: Snowdance
programme.desc: Snowdance is a backcountry snowboarding film. Because even if you’ve never set foot in the backcountry, you can still be grateful that it’s there. Seven years and one pandemic since their fruition, The ManBoys roster still remains largely intact with Chris Rasman, Rusty Ockenden, Matt Belzile, Jody Wachniak, Beau Bishop Eric Jackson. Snowdance was filmed by Ben Webb, Connor Winton, Dave Craig, and Ryan Kenny.

programme.title: Air Time Podcast - Shin Campos
programme.desc: Shin, the timeless powder hound, has been an iconic presence since the late '80s. With a career spanning decades, he's not only witnessed, but lived through it all. From a gritty renegade in Whistler, crafting local videos with his homies, to scaling the peaks of snowboarding stardom with Tree Top, Absinthe, Standard, White Out, and more. He briefly ventured into mountain guiding but a tragic incident led him to a new path. Today, Shin orchestrates cinematic magic behind the lens, skillfully managing and producing awe-inspiring commercial shoots that dominate the sea-to-sky landscapes. Although he's moved on from professional snowboarding, his passion remains unwavering. Shin's story epitomizes passion, resilience, and evolution. Enjoy the show!

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 3: Stunts, studs sanctuaries
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we go behind the scenes with The Devil’s Horsemen - a family run company who have been providing horses carriages for the film industry for over 30 years, we break down the art of dressage training at Australia’s Mulawa Performance, and we follow a successful rehabilitation and rehoming story at the Mare Foal Sanctuary in England.

programme.title: FEI Rides Magazine - Episode 4: Wild horses Switzerland's jumping prodigy
programme.desc: On this week’s RIDE we’re taming some of New Zealand’s feral Kaimanawa horses with Kiwi adventurer Chloe Phillips-Harris, aiming for Tokyo and beyond with young Swiss jumper Bryan Balsiger, and swapping machinery for horses at one of Italy’s most environmentally friendly vineyards.

programme.title: Jumping International Le Saut Hermès - Highlights Le Saut Hermès

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: How do you top the already in many ways superior iconic Porsche 911? You come up with the GT3. It's the ultimate melange of road suitability and race track compatibility. And Porsche's RS model is even more intense.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: The Tushek TS600, a limited edition super sports car had a power/weight ratio that is on the level of GT3 racing cars. The Bentley Continental GT3-R special edition was also limited whereas McLaren offered their 570S to all customers.

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Karen on the Rock
programme.desc: Karien Minier is surrounded by tough guys in the company of Felix Baumgartner, Bruce Willis and Kobe Bryant. However, she doesn't forget to glitter with Kanye West, the most stylish rapper of the moment!

programme.title: Silent Revolution
programme.desc: A documentary series exploring the European BMX scene, following riders across competitions, training, and daily life to reveal the dedication, culture, and challenges behind professional BMX.

programme.title: Temporary Autonomy Zone
programme.desc: For their fourth full movie Temporary Autonomy Zone the Gpsy Feelin’ boys focus on the riders’ life in a society that destroys him more than it helps him.

programme.title: The Long Hope
programme.desc: A top climber attempts a historic one-day ascent of a legendary sea cliff, while the story revisits the original first ascent 40 years earlier, contrasting extreme modern climbing with the legacy of a pioneering climber returning one last time.

programme.title: Tomorrow Will Be Better
programme.desc: Czech freestyle motocross star Libor Podmol is proof that the wildest dreams come true. In January, 2010 he flies to the US, buys a Suzuki 250 two-stroke, becomes 6 times world champ and signs a sponsorship deal with Rockstar Energy.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 5
programme.desc: There are two elements that grabbed our attention during the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Relay European Championships: the UK’s Connor Bainbridge and the Polish team.Along with his teammate Elli Aldridge, Connor managed to defend his European title. Meanwhile, the Polish team was the great surprise of the championship, having two out of their six teams qualifying to the gold fleet. After that, we will focus on the Kite venues hosting the hottest action from the kite events.We will discover why riders love these locations and what makes the International Kiteboarding Association so confident in the venues. Finally, we reencounter four-time world champion, Daniela Moroz, who shared some more golden Kiteboarding tips.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 6
programme.desc: As we come to the end of the 2020 series, we'll take a look back over all the happenings earlier this season in the extreme world of kiteboarding as well as the transformation of the sport on the road to Paris 2024.Later on, we are set to find out what happened during the last event of the season, the 2020 KiteFoil European Championships taking place in Playa de las Burras, Gran Canaria, Spain. We end our journey travelling to the USA to meet one of the most popular riders in the world: Daniela Moroz.

programme.title: Vendée Globe Weekly Highlights - Episode 13
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Why Not Whitewater?
programme.desc: Welcome to Dimaro, the Rafting Center Val di Sole. Our story begins in 1982 when a group of adventurers decided to make history by being the first humans to raft down the River Noce. Not only they managed to go down the river against all odds, but they also fell in love with its beautiful landscapes and decided to share it with the rest of the world.Why Not Whitewater? takes us on a journey to the north of Italy to explore the valleys and rivers in the most adventurous ways. From canoening to kayaking and from rafting to hydrospeed, we are set to live an odyssey filled with adrenaline and fun that will leave you wondeing why not white water this summer!

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Armenian Haunting
programme.desc: An Armenian-American journalist turns into an unwilling ghost hunter while researching the sudden deaths in her family and their connection to a paranormal mystery.

programme.title: Reel Nightmare: Book of Nightmare
programme.desc: Three beautiful, vengeful witches awakened by an ancient book, the Necronomicon, bring production of a film in their old family home to a deadly halt.

programme.title: Sadomaster
programme.desc: Extreme urban violence reigns in Argentina. Senator Beccar Varela rises as the only way to stop violence with his "zero tolerance" politic. People doesn't suspect that Beccar is the head of the nazi gang that causes the violence. When members of the gang torture and rape a retarded man, a mysterious Masked avenger begins his brutal revenge against the gangs and the corrupt politics.

programme.title: Domestic Hell
programme.desc: Jack and Julia are a couple with dark secrets. Blanca is a tortured soul with a past. And Olivia is hellbent on finding the truth. When these four lives intersect, nobody escapes. Bonds are tested; wills are broken; and, metal is forged. It's a tale of survival, trust, and darkness from the creators of Bloody Drama.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E09 - Queen Camilla
programme.desc: The documentary Queen Camilla? takes a closer look at Camilla Parker-Bowles, covering her history, her life, and what lies ahead. It focuses on her long standing ties with Prince Charles. The film also delves into the drama around Camilla's role in Prince Charles's marriage to Princess Diana.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E06 - Missing
programme.desc: Charlie Summerville disappears while trying to transport building supplies by boat. Meanwhile, Pat and Connie Harvie have to handle a flood of volcano experts showing up at the most isolated ranch in America.

programme.title: Wardens - S08:E01 - Sturgeon Spearing
programme.desc: Michigan's District 3 is home to the state's only sturgeon spearing season. The limit is low, but the reward can be a fish of a lifetime.

programme.title: Wardens - S08:E02 - Snowmobile Patrol
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers in the U. P. have a lengthy snowmobile season to patrol. From sound checks to safe riding on trails, it's never a dull day in the snow.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue - S01:E08 - No Short Cuts
programme.desc: Tim demands a lot of everyone around him, especially during a cave rescue, which he describes as the worst kind of rescue.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S01:E01 - Naturally Breathtaking
programme.desc: Do you know where in the world the last untouched glacier is? Where is the highest and the smallest waterfall? Which desert is the driest or the largest? Would you like to know where the most inaccessible mountains, the lowest point of the oceans or the great salt deserts are? This series offers all the answers.In the first episode, we discover breathtaking glaciers in Argentina, infinite plane in the middle of Europe, thermal miracles of Hungary, stalactite caves protected by UNESCO and the most active volcano in New Zealand – White island.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E01 - Riggins Gold
programme.desc: Today on Gold Fever join Tom and his daughter Kia, are on the mighty Salmon River, doing some underwater metal detecting, looking for gold nuggets.

programme.title: Gold Fever - S20:E02 - Blue Bucket Oregon Trail
programme.desc: Today on Gold Fever join Tom and his daughter Kia, are on the Oregon trail, hunting for the legendary Blue Bucket Mine.

programme.title: Harry Meghan: A Very Modern Romance
programme.desc: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry share similar interests and seem like a perfect match. Both have faced tough times growing up but have come out on top. Now they're winning together. This hour-long special, featuring a chat with author Andrew Morton, explores the social backdrop that makes their bold marriage fit right in with today's British Royal Family.

programme.title: Youth Topia
programme.desc: In a world driven by algorithms, a group of "forever teenagers" rebel against the dictates of self-optimization.

programme.title: Burning Beds
programme.desc: Hamburg's housing shortage forces car inspector Gina and British pyromaniac Harry to move into the same apartment.

programme.title: Adam Ondra: Pushing the Limits

A fleeting day of vacation becomes a moment of solidarity and tenderness that challenges the structural norms that govern their daily lives.

The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: God Prompts
programme.desc: We often ask God to do what we want, but faith starts with doing what He says. When you trust God as your good Father and follow His prompting, even small steps can unlock something big.

programme.title: Stop Staring At That Stone
programme.desc: Have you ever noticed how two people can be looking at the same thing and have completely different perspectives on it? One might see a problem while the other sees a reason to praise. There might be something in your life that looks like a problem right now, but God is inviting you to pivot so you can see the truth.

programme.title: Breaking The Bondage Of Wrong Belief
programme.desc: The belief that we need something other than God is what keeps us from going through breakthroughs. That’s how we can be in covenant with God but still in captivity. In “Breaking The Bondage Of Wrong Belief,” Pastor Steven Furtick helps us break up with what’s been holding us back.

programme.title: It Works In Reverse
programme.desc: God chose you. In “It Works In Reverse,” Pastor Steven Furtick explains that God shows us what we’re chosen for as we move forward in faith.

programme.title: Old Roots New Fruits
programme.desc: In “Old Roots New Fruits,” Pastor Holly Furtick reminds us that if we’re rooted in Christ, we can find hope even in the places where we feel stumped.

programme.title: God Prompts
programme.desc: We often ask God to do what we want, but faith starts with doing what He says. When you trust God as your good Father and follow His prompting, even small steps can unlock something big.

programme.title: This Is Then
programme.desc: Some things look “stupid” to the world… until God uses them to change everything. If you’ve been holding back because you need everything to make sense, this will call you to trust what God promised and practice gratitude in the hard place.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Lorena begins to open up to Marco Aurelio, and tells him that her ex-partner is a criminal, a murderer, who has threatened her with the life of her own son. Patricia does not mix her personal life with her work, so she will help the nurse get her son back. Pablo sees photos of Malena with Alfonso and orders to continue the follow-up, as they will be evidence that he will present to take the child from her. Lorena shows a photo of Guillermo to Marco Aurelio on his cell phone and he identifies him without a doubt as the hitman who tried to kill him.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Omar suspects that Marco Aurelio has information that he does not reveal, but the clever lawyer does not give himself away. Omar and the Chief of Police rule out the possibility that people linked to a cartel are behind Marco Aurelio's assassination attempt. Claudio promises Lorena to personally deliver Ignacio to him if he ends his brother's life. Lorena holds the gun, looking for the strength to fire it.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Sólo Camila debe conocer el contenido de lo escrito en el cuaderno. Su ira y rabia va creciendo y piensa que su mamá tiene el derecho de vengarse. Las implicadas sienten miedo y nerviosismo ante lo contenido en el cuaderno. Max llama a Camila y aunque dice que lo ama mucho, no expresa alegría por la próxima boda.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cuatro mujeres que destruyeron la vida de Rosa Blanco se reencuentran en una casa vacía. Camila se enfrenta a Fausto acusando a Patricia de ser la asesina de Leoncio. Otra vez un motorizado le advierte que no siga buscando a su mamá y le arrebata la carta.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Mucha confusión en Camila, nada justifica las mentiras y cada vez Camila está más decepcionada de los engaños de la Madre Isabel. Ezequiel confronta a Julia y agrede salvajemente a Gregorio al encontrarlos juntos.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel confiesa a Camila pero la muchacha sabe que aún miente. Jeli, su hermanita, sufre por la irresponsabilidad de Fernando, que la embarazó. Max anuncia a Marcelina y Astrid que pronto se casará con Camila.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto contrata a Antón, un delincuente, para asesinar a Rosa Blanco; Camila y Max, felices, cuentan al Padre Tiziano, sobre su próxima boda. Acompañados de Luciano, citan a Rosa en una concurrida calle, pero ella no aparece. Mientras, Sebastián y Julia, Amelia y Gregorio, en sus respectivas casas, comparten tristezas.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila explica a Ezequiel y Julia el motivo de su felicidad: se casará con Max, y también pronto se reunirá con su madre. Por medio de Luciano, Rosa le envía la dirección donde van a encontrarse, pero Elda, rabiosa, copia los datos y los revela al Inspector Torrealba que ordena un operativo policial para detenerla.

programme.title: Morirse En Domingo
programme.desc: Julio Salas muere tras una larga enfermedad, pero es domingo y su familia por dificultades económicas se ve forzada a contratar los servicios de una modesta agencia funeraria.

programme.title: Hienas
programme.desc: Luis ha metido la pata... hasta el fondo. Pero Pepe está ahí para ayudarlo... a caer. Ninguno de los dos tenía idea del grandísimo lío en el que andaban metidos ya desde hacía tiempo. Una liada de cojones.

programme.title: El Secreto Oculto
programme.desc: Describe los eventos del fin de los tiempos de la humanidad profetizada por místicos y Santos sobre los 3 días de oscuridad en que los demonios serán soldados ...

programme.title: Amar
programme.desc: Carlos quiere pero Susana no. Joel no quiere pero Patricia lo obliga. Gabriel lo espera pero Martha no se lo da. Amado lo busca con una gringa y lo pierde. Benito lo tiene toda la vida. Concha se lo lleva más allá del sistema solar. Todos lo quieren y todos lo dan pero unos no lo reciben y otros quieren más. Así es Amar.

programme.title: Expediente 53 3.0
programme.desc: Un extraño ser del más allá regresa con sed de venganza para acabar con todas las personas que lo han estado atormentando por todos estos años, decidiendo poseer a Jack y darle más fuerza a Baal.

programme.title: El Tirabeque
programme.desc: Sebas es redactor de un periódico digital que nadie lee, está en trámites de divorcio y tiene problemas con el alcohol. Toda su vida se desmorona hasta que le encargan un reportaje sobre los tirabeques. Lo que en un inicio parecía un trabajo tranquilo se convertirá en una investigación de consecuencias impredecibles.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.
